bird.name: Banded martin
bird.summary: The banded martin or banded sand martin (Neophedina cincta) is a small passerine bird in the swallow family Hirundinidae that is endemic to…

relations.subject: Banded martin
relations.evidence: right|thumb|At the Bangweulu Wetlands in Zambia The banded martin is found in open habitats such as farmland, grassland and savannah, usually near water
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
